options_html: Crossing the street, a truck almost ran over us.
As we crossed the street, a truck almost ran over us.
A car almost struck us, crossing the street.
Having crossed the street, a car almost struck us.
correct_answer_html: As we crossed the street, a truck almost ran over us.
